situation: audit-2026-07-03-009 W-011 finding: window.PA_BASE 可被外部脚本（浏览器扩展/XSS payload）篡改，导致所有 fetch 请求重定向到攻击者服务器（SSRF/数据外泄）。api.js IIFE 内一次性读取 BASE 后不再验证，无 scheme/host 校验，无 freeze。kind=direction-shift（审计判定）。
action: 在 api.js IIFE 入口处增加 PA_BASE 校验与固化：(1) 正则 ALLOWED_BASE_RE 仅允许空串（同源相对路径）或 http(s)://host[:port] 形式；非法值 console.warn 并回退为空串。(2) Object.defineProperty(window, 'PA_BASE', {value: BASE, writable: false, configurable: false}) 冻结防后续篡改。(3) 去尾斜杠避免拼接异常。修复范围仅 web/api.js 一个文件。
direction_kind: route-fix-in-practice (script would reuse opt-web; audit classified as direction-shift due to security boundary change but file not in public-interfaces.txt)
outcome_evidence: git commit cda727c on auto/opt-web-1782977902: 1 file changed, 15 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-). cp-guard triggered when using opt-worktree.sh from main (worktree had unmerged W-002/W-006/W-007/W-008/W-009/W-010 changes); edited directly in worktree and committed. ALLOWED_BASE_RE validates scheme/host; Object.defineProperty freezes window.PA_BASE.
